Hero.description: I design and develop web applications end-to-end. TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js are at the core of my current stack. Focused on scalable, maintainable code and efficient solutions.

Projects.title: Featured
Projects.description: A set of projects showcasing my skills and experience in web development, highlighting the diversity of technologies and approaches used to solve real-world problems.

sacaturno.label: Online Booking SaaS
sacaturno.title: SacaTurno
sacaturno.description: Software service for managing appointments online. Includes a 15-day free trial, then a monthly subscription via Mercado Pago with automatic activation. Just create your account, configure your business and services, and start booking right away.

telovendo.label: Online Catalog
telovendo.title: Telovendo Santa Fé
telovendo.description: Website for Telovendo Santa Fé, a vehicle dealership. Modern responsive design, vehicle catalog, quote request form, private admin panel with CRM for client management and a digital PDF quoting tool.

app420.label: Custom Development
app420.title: 420app - Inventory & Orders
app420.description: Custom-built web application to streamline product and order management. Features percentage-based price adjustments, individual profit margin settings, and efficient order management.

altiva.label: Corporate Catalog
altiva.title: Altiva Propiedades
altiva.description: Web application for Altiva Propiedades with a responsive interface, institutional landing page, and property listing module with advanced filters. Includes a private admin panel with a real estate CRM.

somacann.label: E-commerce
somacann.title: Somacann
somacann.description: E-commerce built on the proprietary E-Mart platform, with a product catalog, shopping cart, and Mercado Pago checkout. Implements order management and an optimized purchase flow.

encino.label: Landing Page
encino.title: Encino Carpintería
encino.description: Custom landing page for Encino Carpintería, focused on performance and user experience. Responsive design, asset optimization, SEO best practices, dynamic sections, and contact forms.

emart.label: E-commerce Platform
emart.title: E-Mart
emart.description: Full-featured e-commerce platform with a storefront and admin panel. Catalog with advanced filters, Mercado Pago checkout, user authentication, purchase history. Backoffice with full management of products, categories, shipping, orders, and automated notifications.

TechStack.title: Tech
TechStack.description: A set of technologies I use to build scalable, high-performance web applications
TechStack.frameworksDescription: Technologies I use to build from the interface to the server.
TechStack.databasesDescription: Database systems I use for data persistence and management.
TechStack.librariesDescription: Tools I integrate to extend functionality across my projects.

Certificates.title: Courses &
Certificates.description: Courses and certifications I've collected throughout my journey as a developer.

ucip.title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript
ucip.description: A 4-month course focused on the fundamentals of web development: structure, styles, and interactivity from scratch.

udemy1.title: JavaScript Full Stack MERN/MEVN
udemy1.description: Full stack web development with JavaScript. Frontend with React and Vue.js, backend with Node.js and Express, MongoDB as the database. Covers authentication, deployment, and modern web development best practices.

anthropic.title: Claude Code In Action
anthropic.description: Hands-on course covering Claude Code's agentic CLI: building autonomous coding agents, leveraging tool use, managing context, and integrating Claude into real-world development workflows with the Anthropic API.

udemy2.title: Full Stack React, Next.js & Node.js with TypeScript
udemy2.description: Comprehensive Full Stack training with React and TypeScript. Next.js 14 with Server Actions, Zustand, Zod, React Hook Form, APIs with Node.js, MongoDB (Mongoose) and PostgreSQL (Prisma), authentication and role management.

utn.title: Higher Technical Degree in Programming
utn.description: Advanced student in the final year. Training in OOP, algorithms and data structures, databases, operating systems, and computer architecture.

Contact.title: Let's get in
Contact.description: If you've made it here, we probably have something to talk about. Feel free to reach out, whether for a project or a job opportunity.
